errors.no-speech: No speech detected. Try speaking again.
errors.audio-capture: Microphone unavailable. Check your audio device.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.not-allowed: Microphone permission denied. Allow access in your browser settings.
errors.service-not-allowed: Speech recognition is blocked. Make sure you are on HTTPS and have granted permission.
errors.language-not-supported: The selected language is not supported by this browser.
errors.not-available: Speech recognition is not available in this browser. Try Chrome, Edge, or Safari.
